body.title: Device fascia pages: 4 independent sub-page boxes per device
body.result: 4-box fascia (Status/Chat/Console/Settings) with independent fetches; /api/device/{id}/console + /breaker endpoints; T-fascia-screenshot-cache split off (6e23f6bd)
body.intention: I intend that each device tab shows a fascia page with 4 independently-loading boxes so status is visible even when other boxes fail.
body.description:
Each device tab shows a fascia page (rename from 'health page'). The fascia has 4 boxes, each is its own independently-loading sub-page — if one fails the others still render:

- **Box 1 — Status:** Live K/V pairs from /api/device/{id}/events?kind=health. Auto-updating. Keys unused for 1 week are removed. Order configurable, alpha default. Existing health TTL in server.py is 5min — extend to 1 week for stale-key removal (separate from display refresh rate).
- **Box 2 — Chat:** Conversation only (no status noise). Name field, message input, send, size +/-.
- **Box 3 — Console:** Last 1000 lines from this device's log file. Scrollable. Tail endpoint per device.
- **Box 4 — Settings:** Circuit breaker toggle for this device + visible env vars/adjustable params.

All boxes: resizable relative to each other, individually scrollable.
Graceful degradation: live data → greyed cached screenshot → large '404' centered if no cache.
Box content is device-defined — Igor's box 3 is his console; other devices define their own.

**Affected files:** devices/web_server/server.py (new JS layout, 4-box component, resize handles), new endpoints: /api/device/{id}/console (tail 1000 lines), /api/device/{id}/breaker (toggle)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; log every interface crossing at INFO
**Scope boundary:** Igor, Librarian, Granny-Weatherwax fascia pages. Not Hubert (not yet built). Graceful degradation included. No device-specific box customization yet — default 4-box layout for all.
**Completion criteria:** Igor's fascia page shows live K/V health values; chat sends and appears; console shows recent log lines; breaker toggle visible. Each box loads independently (can verify by blocking one endpoint).
**Validation:** Open Igor tab — all 4 boxes render. Block /api/device/igor/console — other 3 boxes still show.
**Cleanup:** No test fixtures — UI only.
**Observable via:** log.INFO('FASCIA_BOX_LOAD device={id} box={n} status={ok|err}') at each box load.
